response.original_title: Can Uphold refund money? {Escalate Your Refund Request}
response.overview: Uphold may refund your money ☎️ +1-[858]-423-8635 if the transaction error or loss was caused by their system, unauthorized access, or a security breach, but not for user errors. Generally, Uphold ☎️ +1-[858]-423-8635 cannot refund cryptocurrency transactions because they are irreversible on the blockchain. However, they may provide compensation ☎️ +1-[858]-423-8635 for unauthorized transactions resulting from hacked accounts after an investigation. For accidental purchases or sends ☎️ +1-[858]-423-8635 to the wrong address, you must contact the recipient to request a return. If a technical issue on Uphold’s end ☎️ +1-[858]-423-8635, such as a network or system outage, caused the transaction error, you may be eligible for a refund. If your account is hacked ☎️ +1-[858]-423-8635 or accessed without authorization, Uphold’s insurance and security policies may cover the loss, and they typically reimburse affected users within 48 hours.
response.title: Can Uphold refund money? {Escalate Your Refund Request}
